title: Admissions
description: How to apply Duke Kunshan University? For more information about the application process and admissions requirements for each program, please refer this.
text:
Admissions
Intellectually curious, globally minded, ambitious students—this is who we are looking for at Duke Kunshan University. We are a community of exceptionally talented learners, and we are looking for students who can challenge us as much as we can challenge them.
Prospective Duke Kunshan students should apply directly to their preferred academic program. For more information about the application process and admissions requirements for each program, please refer to the menu at right.
We also invite you to learn more about Duke Kunshan University by contacting an admissions representative or attending a campus visit or information session.
Undergraduate Admissions
Undergraduate Admissions

International Applicants
Tuition & Cost of Attendance
Scholarship & Financial Aid

Graduate Admissions
Master of Engineering in Electrical and Computer Engineering
Master of Environmental Policy
Master of Science in Medical Physics
Master of Science in Global Health
Master of Management Studies
Tuition & Fees
Information about tuition, fees and cost of attendance.
Financial Aid & Scholarships
With both merit- and need-based financial aid available, see how we can help finance your education at Duke Kunshan University. Learn how to apply for scholarships and more.
International Students
Find information for international students applying to Duke Kunshan University, including requirements and available services.
Admitted Students
Now that you've been admitted, find all the information you will need to prepare to attend Duke Kunshan University.
Information Sessions
Check our calendar to see if there are any upcoming information sessions in your area.
Campus Life
There is always something happening on campus. Find out what the Duke Kunshan campus has to offer.
Explore Duke Kunshan
Welcome to Duke Kunshan’s Virtual Campus Tour! Take our online guided tour to see the Duke Kunshan University campus at any time, from any location.
Popular Questions
A record of outstanding academic achievement and a passion for learning;
Strong English language proficiency
Strong interest in Duke Kunshan’s innovative, integrated and interdisciplinary liberal arts curriculum
An adventurous spirit and global orientation
Highly motivated, with a demonstrated ability to contribute to campus and community life
The ability to overcome obstacles in various forms
